title: Generate Dynamic OpenGraph Images in Next.js
summary: Create dynamic social share preview images using next/og and ImageResponse in Next.js App Router, with custom fonts, dynamic parameters, and metadata integration.
declaration: I will set up dynamic OpenGraph image generation using next/og. This creates social share images (og:image, Twitter Card) rendered as JSX on the Edge Runtime and served as PNG. Images update automatically per page using Next.js metadata.
